evals.prompt: I'm 6 weeks from launching my AI resume builder. I want to start collecting emails now. I'm building with Next.js and Supabase, no email service yet. Set me up.
evals.expected_output: A complete waitlist kit: form copy (fields, CTA, trust note), the database schema, an email service recommendation fitting Next.js (e.g. Resend), a confirmation email draft, a 6-week nurture calendar, a launch email draft, and momentum tactics.
assertions: Form copy includes a CTA that is an action phrase, not 'Submit'
A concrete tech recommendation is made for their Next.js/Supabase stack including an email provider
A full confirmation email draft is included
A week-by-week nurture plan covers the 6 weeks until launch
A launch-day email draft is included
At least 3 list-growth tactics beyond the form itself are given

evals.prompt: i have a waitlist of 340 people collected over 2 months but i've never emailed them once. launch is in 10 days. is the list dead? what do i do?
evals.expected_output: Honest triage: the list is cold but recoverable; a re-engagement plan for the 10 days (reintroduction email now, 1-2 nurture touches, launch email), with expectation-setting on open rates and drafts for the key emails.
assertions: The output addresses the cold-list problem directly instead of giving a generic waitlist setup
A re-engagement email draft is provided to send before the launch email
A day-by-day or sequenced plan covers the 10 days to launch
Expectations are set honestly (e.g. lower open rates, some unsubscribes are normal)
